LeidenUniv.MBTH

Class VerticalAlignRadialTransforms

  • java.lang.Object
    • LeidenUniv.MBTH.VerticalAlignRadialTransforms

  • public class VerticalAlignRadialTransforms
extends java.lang.Object

      makes a double sized image from the original first frame to be able to compare each shift with this image to find the minimum differences.

    • Method Detail

      • shiftImage

        public ij.ImagePlus shiftImage(int[] shifts)
        Parameters:
        shifts - x shift array for translations
        Returns:
        the shifted image

      • makeReference

        public void makeReference()
        makes a double sized image from the original first frame to be able to compare each shift with this image to find the minimum differences. The image is stored as FinalRef in the VerticalAlignRadialTransforms object.

      • makeProfileReference

        public void makeProfileReference(int pw)
        Parameters:
        pw - the width of the line used to make the profile

      • getOptimalShifts

        public int[] getOptimalShifts()
        Returns:
        get the int [] for the shifts

      • getOptimalShift

        public int getOptimalShift(ij.process.ImageProcessor toCompare)
        Parameters:
        toCompare - the imageprocessor to compare to the base
        Returns:
        the number of pixels to shift for minimum difference

      • getDifference

        public double getDifference(int k,
                            ij.process.ImageProcessor toCompare)
        Parameters:
        k - the number of pixels to shift
        toCompare - the imageprocessor to compare
        Returns:
        the summed difference over all pixels

      • getShiftsFromProfile

        public int[] getShiftsFromProfile()
        Returns:
        shift array based on profileplot differences

      • getOptimalProfileShift

        public int getOptimalProfileShift(double[] toCheck)
        Parameters:
        toCheck - the profile to check
        Returns:
        the optimal shift in pixels

      • getProfileDifference

        public double getProfileDifference(int k,
                                   double[] toCheck)
        Parameters:
        k - the shift to get the difference for
        toCheck - the profile to check
        Returns:
        the summed difference

      • getShiftedProfiles

        public double[][] getShiftedProfiles(int[] shifts)
        Parameters:
        shifts - the shift array to move the profiles
        Returns:
        the shifted profile array

      • getShiftedArray

        public double[] getShiftedArray(double[] toShift,
                                int shift)
        Parameters:
        toShift - the profile to shift
        shift - the shift to apply
        Returns:
        the shifted profile

      • getAverageProfile

        public double[] getAverageProfile(double[][] toAverage)
        Parameters:
        toAverage - the profile array to average
        Returns:
        the average profile

        for testing
        Parameters:
        args - not used
